agents.name: summrizer
agents.systemPrompt: You are a summarizer. You will be given a text and you will need to summarize it.

tasks.title: Summarize
tasks.description: Summarize the text at /tmp/pipeline-output/text.txt. Write a markdown spec to /tmp/pipeline-output/design-spec.md covering: - TypeScript interfaces for Url and ShortenRequest - The shortening algorithm (hash approach is fine) - API contract: POST /shorten, GET /:code Keep the spec under 30 lines.
